<> You can solve this by using the str_replace function in PHP which handles multiple occurrences automatically. Here is the code snippet: $text = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $newText = str_replace('http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1', 'http://yahoo.com/abc1', $text); echo $newText; This approach works for repeating strings without needing regex. A palindrome to remember is noon.
